content.en:
"Talent Ancestral Pool, there are not many such treasures even in the domain realm, I didn't expect a Talent Ancestral Pool to appear in the battlefield ruins, it's incredible. This year's gods and generals are too lucky, if they can enter the talent ancestral pool, they will definitely be able to be reborn!"

Ye Tian sighed.

Others may not know much about the usefulness of the Gifted Ancestral Pool, but he does.

The Talent Ancestral Pool can allow weak creatures to give birth to a natal talent, and it is also a Dao-level natal talent.

Dao-level natal talent is very special, a weak Dao-level natal talent may only be equivalent to a god-level, but a powerful Dao-level natal talent can surpass the super god level and reach an unprecedented level.

In the chaos, when the talent reaches the super god level, it reaches the limit, and there is almost no way to advance to the top, but the Dao-level talent is an exception.

But Dao-level talents cannot be formed naturally, they can only be born through the talent ancestral pool.

That's why the talent ancestral pool is so precious.

"According to the records of the classic space of Black Wind Mountain, Dao-level talents can directly use the power of the Great Dao, and use the power of the Great Dao as the power of the talent, if you have a Dao-level talent, you can even cultivate Dao Techniques at the True Monarch level, and you can exert a certain amount of power!"

Although Ye Tian's strength is strong now, he can't cultivate Dao Technique, at least he needs to reach the True Ancestor before he can hope to practice a Dao Technique.

But Dao-level talents can cultivate Dao skills at the True Monarch level, what a terrifying thing.

Therefore, every Dao-level talent is a real demon, even if it is weaker in other aspects, just a Dao-level talent can make up for everything.

In addition, the gods who can enter the talent ancestral pool are basically the real geniuses of the domain realm, except for some gods with a big background, other gods will have to reach at least ten star gods to be eligible to enter the talent ancestral pool.

After all, the talented ancestral pool can't transform many god generals, and the accumulation of long years can only be changed to a few god generals.

It can be said that the quota of each talent ancestral pool is many times more precious than the number of ancestors who are promoted to Dao Ancestor.

In the domain realm, a quota like the Ancestral Monument could not attract the Middle Triple Heaven Forces and the Upper Triple Heaven Forces at all, they didn't care about any Ancestral Monument at all, but none of the Upper Triple Heaven Forces ignored the Talent Ancestral Pool.

"Yue'er is just at the level of a god general, and she can completely enter the talent ancestral pool!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

If it were a domain realm, a reincarnated person like his wife Xiao Yue would definitely not be eligible to enter the Talent Ancestral Pool, and it would be impossible for the Upper Triple Heaven Force to let the reincarnated reborn person compete for the quota of the Talent Ancestral Pool, but now the Dao Ancestors of the Domain Realm could not be born, so no one would care about such a thing.

So, it's an opportunity!

At the same time, Ye Tian was also thinking about a question.

That is, whether the replication talent can replicate the Dao-level natal talent, if it can be copied, then the birth of the talent ancestral pool this time is also a huge opportunity for him.

When the Divine Generals came out of the Talent Ancestral Pool, he could copy everyone's Dao-level natal talents.

Once he has multiple Dao-level natal talents, he can practice a variety of Dao techniques, and his strength will inevitably reach an incredible level at the True Monarch level.

Moreover, Ye Tian firmly believed that the Dao-level natal talent was definitely not just as simple as being able to cultivate Dao techniques at the True Monarch level, otherwise it would not have made the Upper Triple Heaven forces so crazy that they would seize the Talent Ancestral Pool at all costs, and even not allow the Middle Triple Heaven Forces and the Lower Triple Heaven Forces to get their hands on the Talent Ancestral Pool.

"If those Upper Triple Heaven forces learn that the Genius Ancestral Pool is occupied by people from our realm, I'm afraid they will all go crazy, but they can't be born at the moment, and I'm afraid they don't dare to pay the price to be forcibly born, so they are helpless!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The Talent Ancestral Pool is so important, the four transcendent forces probably want to occupy it, but unfortunately the Gifted Ancestral Pool can't move, and now it's exposed, and it is impossible for any transcendent force to occupy it alone.

In addition, the true power of the four transcendent forces is in chaos, and the four transcendent forces in the quasi-Dao realm are actually not powerful, and they are not even as good as some of the top powers.

Therefore, the talent ancestral pool is not something that any one force can occupy alone, so it is shared, and the gods will compete to obtain the quota to enter the talent ancestral pool.

--------

"Yue'er, the talent ancestral pool is about to open, do you want to participate?"

Ye Tian found Xiao Yue and told Xiao Yue about the situation.

"Of course!"

Xiao Yue hurriedly said.

After Ye Tian told it, she also knew how powerful the Dao-level natal talent was, and once she obtained the Dao-level natal talent, there were too many benefits.

Moreover, entering the Talent Ancestral Pool, its own potential will also be improved to a certain extent, and any god general will want to enter the Talent Ancestral Pool.

She, naturally, is no exception!

"Yue'er, you are only a nine-star peak god general now, there are too many god generals in the chaos, for example, the four transcendent forces must have a nine-star peak god general, or even more than one or two, with your current strength, you may not be able to get a place steadily, it is best to increase your strength to a ten-star god general!" Ye Tian admonished.

"Husband, it's too late, according to what you said, you need to sign up now, and in a few years, you will start the battle of the talented ancestral pool god generals, even if you use the time array in a few years, you won't be able to improve your strength to a ten-star god general!" Xiao Yue shook her head and said.

Ye Tian also understood this truth, it took him a long time to ascend from the peak of the nine-star god to the ten-star god general, and it was true that he could not be promoted to the ten-star god general in just a few years, but it was not absolutely impossible.

"Yue'er, this is for you!"

Ye Tian took out a Heavenly Soul Pill.

The Heavenly Soul Pill is an elixir refined by using the Heavenly Soul Fruit, and one Heavenly Soul Pill is enough to make Xiao Yue's soul go through ten thousand years in an instant, and it is ten thousand years when his comprehension has increased to a terrifying level.

Using the effect of a Heavenly Soul Pill, Xiao Yue could completely cultivate a secret technique and supernatural powers to the extreme, and could even comprehend the alchemy technique to a higher level.

Although the cultivation of alchemy requires accumulation step by step, if you understand all the alchemy techniques thoroughly, and then use the time array to take resources to refine, you can make rapid progress.

Therefore, one Heavenly Soul Pill was enough for Xiao Yue to break the shackles and become a ten-star god general.

Although it is too wasteful for the god to take the Heavenly Soul Pill at the level of the gods, if he can obtain a Dao-level natal talent, then everything is worth it.

"Heavenly Soul Pill, with it, I can definitely break the shackles and become a ten-star god general!"

Xiao Yue was full of confidence.

Immediately, she began to take the Heavenly Soul Pill, and Ye Tian personally protected the Dharma for her.

Soon, the effect of the Heavenly Soul Pill worked, and Xiao Yue's soul quickly experienced the passage of ten thousand years.

In a short time, Xiao Yue has experienced 10,000 years.
